name: Locaweb Servicos de Internet S.A.
summary: Locaweb Servi√É¬ßos de Internet S.A. offers hosting and cloud services in Brazil. The company operates in two segments, Be Online and Software as a Service (BeOnline & SaaS), and Commerce. It offers data transmission, voice, and images and sound services; gateway electronic payments; data center solutions; and internet and website hosting services, corporate e-mail solutions, domain registration, etc. The company also provides solutions for receiving online payments to small and large businesses; solutions based on the SaaS model for virtual stores; SaaS delivery and management solutions for restaurants; digital management and marketing solution for social media networks; and multichannel integration platform for retail operations. In addition, it operates a logistics platform that connects small and medium-sized sellers, as well as offers credit solutions for small and medium-sized businesses; and an application ecosystem with various market platforms to optimize the results of virtual stores. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
